title: Sanjay Dutt’s Recovery Journey
story: After struggling with substance abuse in his early career, Sanjay Dutt sought professional help and rehabilitation. Today, he openly speaks about recovery and resilience.

title: Robert Downey Jr. – From Addiction to Global Success
story: After years of addiction and legal issues, he entered rehab and rebuilt his career, becoming one of Hollywood’s most successful actors.

title: Anonymous Recovery Story – Delhi
story: A 32-year-old engineer sought therapy and joined a structured rehab program. With CBT and family support, he has remained sober for over 5 years.
